infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX 17 - 19 July 2026 From The Stewards To The Team Manager, Scuderia Ferrari HP Document 57 Date 19 July 2026 Time 16:18 The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the following: No / Driver 44 - Lewis Hamilt

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX
17 - 19 July 2026
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
Scuderia Ferrari HP
Document 57
Date 19 July 2026
Time 16:18
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following
matter and determine the following:
No / Driver 44 - Lewis Hamilton
Competitor Scuderia Ferrari HP
Time 15:04
Session Race
Fact Causing a collision with Car 63 in turn 5
Infringement Breach of Appendix L, Chapter IV, Article 2 d) of the FIA International Sporting Code.
Decision 5 second time penalty.
Reason The Stewards reviewed video, team radio and in-car video evidence.
Approaching Turn 5 on the opening lap, Car 63 attempted an overtake around the
outside of Car 44 and had established sufficient overlap to be entitled to racing room.
Car 44 remained on the inside.
During the corner, Car 44 experienced understeer and, despite attempting to avoid
Car 63 by applying corrective steering, made contact with the right-hand side of Car
63 with its left-front wheel. The Stewards determined that Car 63 remained within the
available racing room and that the collision was caused by Car 44 being unable to
maintain sufficient separation.
The Stewards recognise s
